name: PaLM (540B)
license: Proprietary (Google; limited later API access, no public weights)
note: 540B dense Pathways model; first to demonstrate strong chain-of-thought reasoning breakthroughs at scale.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via research.google/blog and arxiv.org/abs/2204.02311, both dated/consistent with 2022-04-04 release -- 540.35B dense Pathways-trained decoder-only Transformer, matches paramsB/archDisplay. Fetched full paper text (ar5iv rendering) and confirmed literal scores: MMLU 5-shot 69.3, GSM8K 8-shot CoT+calculator 58, TriviaQA 1-shot 81.4 -- all three rows matched exactly, kept unchanged. Context length 2048 tokens confirmed via full-text fetch. langCount=124 corroborated by an independent citation of the PaLM paper's tokenizer/training corpus (paper itself says 'over 100 languages'; 124 is the more precise figure cited elsewhere) -- kept as a reasonable value. Closed/proprietary confirmed (no public weights; later restricted API access via PaLM API).
